title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 52.220 - Collector of St. Louis City — duties
text:
52.220.  Collector of St. Louis City — duties. — The collector of the City of St. Louis shall collect the state taxes in the limits of said city in the same manner and to the same extent, and do and perform all other things and matters appertaining thereto, as fully to all intents and purposes as now required, or which may be required, of the county collectors.
(RSMo 1939 § 11235) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 10004; 1919 § 12994; 1909 § 11546 
Collector of revenue and deputies in St. Louis City--compensation, 82.605 to 82.680
